item.name: Spectresaur
item.description:
Eyewitnesses claim it to be the spirit of a long-dead seabeast. In truth, it is very much alive, which is probably a lot worse than if it were a ghost.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: As if a hulking scalekin with a fang-filled maw wasn't terrifying enough, this spectral harbinger appears to be warped by a surfeit of aetheric power.
